name: persona-firsttimer-journey
note: S-COMPOSE-CALM slice 3, P1 First-Timer goalpost (design table: 'tour -> Library -> hears a song; Compose shows starters, 5 taps to sound'). A truly fresh device, and - unlike welcome-tour.json which picks a level - P1 SKIPS the level ask, so this scenario owns the SAFE-DEFAULT path: unset level must behave as beginner (starter cards present, nothing dense). Tap budget to first sound via Compose: Next, Next, Start playing (3) + Compose tab (4) + one starter card (5). The Library detour (tap a song, see the playable sheet) is the 'hears a song' half of the journey.

steps.label: fresh device: the tour greets first
level was SKIPPED and stays unset (the safe-default path this scenario owns)
skipper lands on guitar-standard (the widest-audience default) with the tour done for good
hears a song: the first Library tap opens a playable chord sheet (Practice), no browse maze
unset level shows the beginner landing: starter cards PRESENT (the theorist scenario asserts their absence for advanced)
5th tap = sound: one starter fills the strip with a playable progression
and the jam surface stays calm for a first-timer - zero ambient song chrome
steps.js: (function(){function gone(sel){var e=document.querySelector(sel);return !e || e.hidden || e.getBoundingClientRect().height===0;}return gone('#composeModeSeg') && gone('#songTray') && gone('#songMap');})()
